title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Anthropic published guidance on building agent harnesses for Claude Code in large codebases, emphasizing that the surrounding system architecture matters more than the model itself. Cole Medin built a complete reference implementation of the AI Layer harness, including components like self-improving hooks, path-scoped skills, LSP integration, MCPs, and subagents.
